meta.note: Visual color and typography tokens are intentionally minimal for now. Figma may overwrite this file later.

baseUnit.$description: All spacing and layout measurements should be multiples of this value unless there is a documented exception.

minimumInteractiveSize.$description: Minimum practical element size for controls and clickable UI.

defaultSvgViewport.$description: Small icons sit inside a 24 by 24 SVG viewport.

minimumContainerSize.$description: Icons smaller than the interactive minimum should sit inside a 40 by 40 control/container.

minimumWordsPerSegment.$description: Every dash-separated segment must contain at least two word parts (for example base-unit, media-loader, marker-size). Never use a single character or a lone word as a segment. Invalid: a, x, orange, size.

pattern.$description: Use the shortest complete name. Each segment must satisfy minimumWordsPerSegment. State is optional; scope and property are not.

examples.$description: Examples of stable searchable token names.

height.$description: Intentional exception to the 8px grid because this is a loading indicator line, not layout spacing.
